/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/agp_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/agp_tests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agp_tests.dir/tests/test_geometry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agp_tests.dir/tests/test_visibility.cpp.o CMakeFiles/agp_tests.dir/tests/test_arrangement.cpp.o -o agp_tests  libagp_lib.a lib/libgtest.a lib/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib64/libgmpxx.so /lib64/libmpfr.so /lib64/libgmp.so /usr/lib64/libglpk.so lib/libgtest.a
